---
name: Subagent Improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing subagent's prompt, knowledge, or behavior
title: "[SUBAGENT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Which subagent?

- [ ] Advisor Impact Analyzer
- [ ] SLO Guardian
- [ ] Security Posture Auditor
- [ ] E-Commerce Domain Expert
- [ ] PIR Generator

## Which file(s)?

- [ ] `subagent.yaml` (system prompt / handoff description)
- [ ] Knowledge file(s)
- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `demo-flow.md`
- [ ] Example report

## What should change?

Describe the improvement. Be specific about:
- What the agent currently does
- What it should do instead
- Why the change matters

## Example prompt and expected output

```
Prompt: <what you'd ask the agent>

Expected output: <what the agent should produce>

Current output: <what the agent actually produces (if applicable)>
```

## Impact

- [ ] Changes agent behavior (system prompt / knowledge)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Adds new capability
- [ ] Fixes incorrect output

## Additional context

Any other context or examples.
